steps.title: Define the May sales
steps.content: Let $S$ be the number of sales in May. April sales were $12$ more than $3$ times May sales, so April sales were $3S+12$.

steps.title: Use the total sales
steps.content:
April and May together had $356$ sales.
$$S+(3S+12)=356$$

steps.title: Find May sales
steps.content: Solve the equation. $$4S+12=356$$ $$4S=344$$ $$S=86$$ The answer is 86.
